## ✅ Checklist

### Code Quality
- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes
- [ ] I have checked for and fixed any spelling/grammar errors

### Security
- [ ] No sensitive data (API keys, tokens, passwords) is committed
- [ ] All inputs are properly validated and sanitized
- [ ] Authentication/authorization checks are in place
- [ ] Rate limiting is implemented where applicable
- [ ] SQL injection / XSS protections are in place

### Performance
- [ ] No unnecessary database queries
- [ ] No memory leaks
- [ ] Proper caching implemented
- [ ] Lazy loading where beneficial
- [ ] Bundle size not significantly increased

### UI/UX
- [ ] Responsive design works on all screen sizes
- [ ] Dark mode compatibility maintained
- [ ] Accessibility standards followed (WCAG 2.1)
- [ ] Keyboard navigation works
- [ ] Screen reader compatible
- [ ] Loading states added
- [ ] Error states handled gracefully

### Mobile
- [ ] Mobile responsive tested
- [ ] Touch gestures work
- [ ] Mobile performance optimized
- [ ] Offline capability considered

### Internationalization (i18n)
- [ ] All user-facing text is translatable
- [ ] Translations updated for added/changed text
- [ ] RTL layout supported (if applicable)

### Documentation
- [ ] API documentation updated
- [ ] README updated (if applicable)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated
- [ ] Inline code comments added
- [ ] Migration guide provided (for breaking changes)
